title: Source collection (reading list)
description: Validates one sources/collections/<name>.yaml file (ARCHITECTURE §3.3: kebab-case filename = collection identity). A collection is a curated, ordered reading/watching list over registered sources — it owns ordering, grouping, and the one-line role of each entry IN THIS LIST. Pedagogical judgments about the source itself stay canonical in the source record's evaluations; collections reference, never re-own. Generated views render each collection as generated/collections/<name>.md.

group.description: Optional section heading; entries keep file order, groups keep first-appearance order.

why.description: One line: the entry's role in THIS list (spine vs supplement, when to reach for it) — not a re-statement of the source evaluation.
